---
title: "Alessio Gaggero"
image: images/alessio.jpg
about:
    template: solana
    image-width: 10em
    links:
        - icon: envelope
          href: mailto:alessiogaggero@ugr.es
          text: Email
        - icon: mortarboard
          href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_AKeoPoAAAAJ
          text: Google Scholar
        - icon: building
          href: https://www.ugr.es/personal/alessio-gaggero
          text: UGR
        - icon: twitter-x
          href: https://x.com/GaggeroAlessio
          text: X
        - icon: file-earmark-pdf
          href: files/cv.pdf
          text: CV
---

::: {style="text-align: right; margin-bottom: 1em;"}
[Ver en español](index.es.html){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-secondary}
:::


## About me

I am associate professor at the University of Granada. I use applied microeconometrics to chase questions in labour, health, andeducation. I teach the methods behind these answers at the Universidad de Granada.


## Research interests

Health economics · Education economics · Behavioural economics · Applied microeconometrics · Causal inference


## Office

Facultad de Ciencias Económicas y Empresariales, C105\
Universidad de Granada


## News

- **May 2026** — Seminar: *"Does Children's Genetic Risk for ADHD Affect Parental Divorce?"* at the Department of Economic Theory and History, Universidad de Granada. [Announcement](https://tehieco.ugr.es/informacion/noticias/seminar-alessio-gaggero).

- **January 2026** — *Genetic risk for ADHD and later-life health and wellbeing* published in *The Journal of the Economics of Ageing*. [Blog post on Nada es Gratis](https://nadaesgratis.es/dolores-jimenez/riesgo-genetico-de-tdah-salud-en-adultos-mayores-y-efectos-de-desbordamiento-en-la-pareja).
